hooks.command:
python -c "
import json, sys, re
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
f = d.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path', '')
if re.search(r'\\.(py|yaml)$', f):
    print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'PostToolUse', 'additionalContext': 'You just edited a .py or .yaml file. Check whether README.md or CLAUDE.md needs updating to reflect any logic, config, or default value changes.'}}))
"
